story.text:
# 🔷 Techne / always-revealed
**010100** · (reveal-artifact lands here; the Techne / always-revealed vertex is the destination of Memora's Pattern B reveal-on-key spell. The vertex hosts artifacts in motion rather than a resident Mage.)

*Source:* Cloaking Guide
